title: SOURCE FATMAN SUBJECT ECONOMICS TOPIC 8 BALANCE OF PAYMENT A

questions.question: Which of the following is the main criteria for measuring "Absolute Poverty" in India? / भारत में "निरपेक्ष गरीबी" को मापने का मुख्य मानदंड क्या है?
options: Minimum Calorie Intake / न्यूनतम कैलोरी सेवन
Ownership of a car / कार का स्वामित्व
questions.explanation: Traditionally, India used a poverty line based on the expenditure required to buy 2400 calories in rural and 2100 calories in urban areas.

questions.question: Who chaired the committee that suggested the "Multidimensional Poverty Index" (MPI) approach for India? / उस समिति की अध्यक्षता किसने की जिसने भारत के लिए "बहुआयामी गरीबी सूचकांक" (MPI) दृष्टिकोण का सुझाव दिया?
options: NITI Aayog (based on Oxford/UNDP) / नीति आयोग
questions.explanation: NITI Aayog releases the National MPI which considers health, education, and standard of living.

questions.question: "Relative Poverty" refers to: / "सापेक्ष गरीबी" (Relative Poverty) का तात्पर्य है:
options: Poverty in relation to a fixed poverty line / एक निश्चित गरीबी रेखा के संबंध में गरीबी
Poverty of people living in relatives' houses / रिश्तेदारों के घरों में रहने वाले लोगों की गरीबी
None of the above / उपरोक्त में से कोई नहीं
Poverty in relation to the income of others / दूसरों की आय के संबंध में गरीबी
questions.explanation: It measures inequality in income distribution within a population.

questions.question: Which Five-Year Plan in India was based on the "Mahalanobis Model"? / भारत में कौन सी पंचवर्षीय योजना "महालनोबिस मॉडल" पर आधारित थी?
questions.explanation: The Second Plan (1956-61) focused on heavy industrialization.

questions.question: The "Garibi Hatao" (Remove Poverty) slogan was given during which Five-Year Plan? / "गरीबी हटाओ" का नारा किस पंचवर्षीय योजना के दौरान दिया गया था?
questions.explanation: The slogan was popularized by Indira Gandhi, and the objective was formally incorporated in the 5th Plan.

questions.question: When was NITI Aayog established to replace the Planning Commission? / योजना आयोग के स्थान पर नीति आयोग की स्थापना कब की गई थी?
questions.explanation: NITI stands for National Institution for Transforming India.

questions.question: The "Balance of Payments" (BoP) of a country is a systematic record of: / किसी देश का "भुगतान संतुलन" (BoP) किसका एक व्यवस्थित रिकॉर्ड है?
options: All import and export transactions of the government only / केवल सरकार के सभी आयात और निर्यात लेनदेन
GDP of the country / देश की जीडीपी
Only the movement of gold / केवल सोने की आवाजाही
All economic transactions between residents of a country and the rest of the world / एक देश के निवासियों और शेष विश्व के बीच सभी आर्थिक लेनदेन
questions.explanation: BoP includes the Current Account and Capital Account.

questions.question: Which of the following is a component of the "Current Account" of BoP? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन BoP के "चालू खाते" का एक घटक है?
options: External Commercial Borrowings (ECB) / बाहरी वाणिज्यिक उधार
Export and Import of Goods / वस्तुओं का निर्यात और आयात
Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) / प्रत्यक्ष विदेशी निवेश
questions.explanation: Current account covers visible trade (goods), invisible trade (services), and transfers.

questions.question: A "Balance of Trade" deficit occurs when: / "व्यापार संतुलन" (Balance of Trade) घाटा तब होता है जब:
options: Exports of services > Imports of services
Exports of goods > Imports of goods
Imports of goods > Exports of goods
questions.explanation: BoT only considers visible items (goods).

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT included in India's Foreign Exchange Reserves? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन भारत के विदेशी मुद्रा भंडार में शामिल नहीं है?
options: Foreign Currency Assets (FCA) / विदेशी मुद्रा संपत्ति
Special Drawing Rights (SDR) / विशेष आहरण अधिकार
questions.explanation: Foreign reserves include FCA, Gold, SDRs, and Reserve Tranche Position (RTP) with the IMF.

questions.question: The "Head Count Ratio" (HCR) is used to measure: / "हेड काउंट रेशियो" (HCR) का उपयोग किसे मापने के लिए किया जाता है?
questions.explanation: It is the proportion of the population that lives below the poverty line.

questions.question: "Invisible Trade" in the Balance of Payments refers to: / भुगतान संतुलन में "अदृश्य व्यापार" (Invisible Trade) का तात्पर्य है:
options: Trade in services / सेवाओं में व्यापार
Trade of prohibited drugs / प्रतिबंधित दवाओं का व्यापार
questions.explanation: Services like banking, shipping, and tourism are "invisible" as they have no physical form.

questions.question: The "Vicious Cycle of Poverty" theory was given by: / "गरीबी का दुष्चक्र" (Vicious Cycle of Poverty) सिद्धांत किसके द्वारा दिया गया था?
questions.explanation: It suggests that a poor person is poor because he is poor (low income -> low savings -> low investment -> low productivity).

questions.question: Which of the following is considered "Hot Money"? / निम्नलिखित में से किसे "हॉट मनी" माना जाता है?
options: Money in fixed deposits / सावधि जमा में पैसा
Long term loans / लंबी अवधि के ऋण
questions.explanation: FII is called hot money because it can leave the country very quickly at the first sign of trouble.

questions.question: The First Five-Year Plan (1951-56) gave top priority to: / पहली पंचवर्षीय योजना (1951-56) ने किसे सर्वोच्च प्राथमिकता दी?
questions.explanation: It was based on the Harrod-Domar model and aimed at increasing food production.

questions.question: "Devaluation" of a currency means: / मुद्रा के "अवमूल्यन" का अर्थ है:
options: Fall in the value of gold / सोने के मूल्य में गिरावट
Increase in the domestic prices / घरेलू कीमतों में वृद्धि
Reduction in the value of currency by the government relative to foreign currencies / विदेशी मुद्राओं के सापेक्ष सरकार द्वारा मुद्रा के मूल्य में कमी
Printing of fake currency / नकली मुद्रा की छपाई
questions.explanation: Devaluation makes exports cheaper and imports costlier.

questions.question: "Special Drawing Rights" (SDR) are associated with: / "विशेष आहरण अधिकार" (SDR) किससे संबंधित हैं?
questions.explanation: SDR is an international reserve asset created by the IMF.

questions.question: Which Five-Year Plan was terminated one year before its schedule? / कौन सी पंचवर्षीय योजना अपने निर्धारित समय से एक वर्ष पहले समाप्त कर दी गई थी?
questions.explanation: The Janata Party government terminated the 5th plan in 1978 instead of 1979.

questions.question: "Remittances" from Indians working abroad are recorded in: / विदेशों में काम करने वाले भारतीयों से प्राप्त "रेमिटेंस" (Remittances) को कहाँ दर्ज किया जाता है?
options: Errors and Omissions / त्रुटियाँ और चूक
questions.explanation: Remittances are unilateral transfers and part of the current account.

questions.question: Who is the Chairman of NITI Aayog? / नीति आयोग के अध्यक्ष कौन हैं?
questions.explanation: The Prime Minister is the ex-officio chairman of NITI Aayog.

questions.question: The "Lorenz Curve" shows: / "लोरेंज वक्र" क्या दिखाता है?
questions.explanation: It plots the cumulative percentage of income against the cumulative percentage of the population.

questions.question: "Convertibility of Rupee" at present in India means: / भारत में वर्तमान में "रुपये की परिवर्तनीयता" का अर्थ है:
options: Full convertibility on Capital Account / पूंजी खाते पर पूर्ण परिवर्तनीयता
Full convertibility on Current Account / चालू खाते पर पूर्ण परिवर्तनीयता
Full convertibility on both / दोनों पर पूर्ण परिवर्तनीयता
questions.explanation: India has partial convertibility on the capital account.

questions.question: Which committee recommended the poverty line based on "Nutritional Requirements" for the first time? / किस समिति ने पहली बार "पोषण संबंधी आवश्यकताओं" के आधार पर गरीबी रेखा की सिफारिश की थी?
questions.explanation: Y.K. Alagh Committee (1979) defined the calorie-based poverty line.

questions.question: "External Commercial Borrowings" (ECB) are part of: / "बाहरी वाणिज्यिक उधार" (ECB) किसका हिस्सा हैं?
questions.explanation: ECBs are loans taken by Indian entities from foreign commercial sources.

questions.question: The "Rolling Plan" concept was introduced by: / "रोलिंग प्लान" (Rolling Plan) की अवधारणा किसके द्वारा शुरू की गई थी?
questions.explanation: It was implemented by the Janata Government (1978-80).

questions.question: Consider the following statements regarding "Foreign Direct Investment (FDI)" and "Foreign Portfolio Investment (FPI)": / "प्रत्यक्ष विदेशी निवेश (FDI)" और "विदेशी पोर्टफोलियो निवेश (FPI)" के संबंध में निम्नलिखित कथनों पर विचार करें: Statement 1: FDI involves a long-term interest and management control in a company. / कथन 1: FDI में किसी कंपनी में दीर्घकालिक हित और प्रबंधन नियंत्रण शामिल होता है। Statement 2: FPI is more stable than FDI. / कथन 2: FPI, FDI की तुलना में अधिक स्थिर है। Statement 3: Investing in shares of a company without managing it is typically FPI. / कथन 3: किसी कंपनी के प्रबंधन के बिना उसके शेयरों में निवेश करना आमतौर पर FPI होता है। Q26. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: FDI is stable; FPI (hot money) is volatile and can be withdrawn easily.

questions.question: Assertion (A): A country with a persistent Current Account Deficit (CAD) may face a currency crisis. / अभिकथन (A): लगातार चालू खाता घाटे (CAD) वाले देश को मुद्रा संकट का सामना करना पड़ सकता है। Reason (R): CAD must be financed by a surplus in the Capital Account or by depleting foreign exchange reserves. / कारण (R): CAD को पूंजी खाते में अधिशेष या विदेशी मुद्रा भंडार को कम करके वित्तपोषित किया जाना चाहिए। Q27. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is false but R is true
A is true but R is false
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
questions.explanation: If capital inflows stop and reserves run out, the currency value crashes (like India in 1991).

questions.question: Match the Five-Year Plan with its Main Objective: / पंचवर्षीय योजना को उसके मुख्य उद्देश्य के साथ सुमेलित करें: List I (Plan) | List II (Objective) 1. 1st Plan | A. Self-reliance and Social Justice 2. 2nd Plan | B. Agriculture and Irrigation 3. 5th Plan | C. Heavy Industries Q28. Choose the correct match / सही मिलान चुनें
questions.explanation: 1st Plan (Harrod-Domar); 2nd Plan (Mahalanobis).

questions.question: Regarding "NITI Aayog", which of the following statements are correct? / "नीति आयोग" के संबंध में निम्नलिखित में से कौन से कथन सही हैं? 1. It follows a "Bottom-up" approach. / यह "नीचे से ऊपर" (Bottom-up) दृष्टिकोण का अनुसरण करता है। 2. It has the power to allocate funds to State governments. / इसके पास राज्य सरकारों को धन आवंटित करने की शक्ति है। 3. It acts as a think-tank providing strategic and technical advice. / यह रणनीतिक और तकनीकी सलाह प्रदान करने वाले थिंक-टैंक के रूप में कार्य करता है। Q29. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Statement 2 is false; unlike the Planning Commission, NITI Aayog cannot allocate funds. This is done by the Finance Ministry.

questions.question: Assertion (A): In India, the Poverty Line is criticized for being too low. / अभिकथन (A): भारत में, गरीबी रेखा की बहुत कम होने के कारण आलोचना की जाती है। Reason (R): It is based on a "Subsistence Level" (bare survival) rather than a "Standard of Living" level. / कारण (R): यह "जीवन स्तर" के बजाय "निर्वाह स्तर" (केवल जीवित रहना) पर आधारित है। Q30. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is false but R is true
A is true but R is false
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
questions.explanation: The current lines focus on basic calories/needs rather than quality education or healthcare.

questions.question: Identify the correct sequence of the following accounts in the "Balance of Payments" hierarchy: / "भुगतान संतुलन" पदानुक्रम में निम्नलिखित खातों के सही क्रम की पहचान करें: 1. Current Account / चालू खाता 2. Capital Account / पूंजी खाता 3. Financial Account / वित्तीय खाता (Often merged with Capital) 4. Official Reserves Account / आधिकारिक भंडार खाता Q31. Choose the correct sequence (Summing to zero) / सही क्रम चुनें
options: Current Account + Capital Account + Financial Account = 0
questions.explanation: In accounting terms, BoP always balances; a deficit in one is covered by a surplus in another.

questions.question: Match the Poverty Committee with its unique recommendation: / गरीबी समिति को उसकी अनूठी सिफारिश के साथ सुमेलित करें: List I (Committee) | List II (Recommendation) 1. Tendulkar | A. Calorie intake (2400/2100) 2. Rangarajan | B. Shift from Calorie to a basket of goods (Education/Health) 3. Alagh | C. Higher expenditure limits than Tendulkar Q32. Choose the correct match / सही मिलान चुनें
questions.explanation: Tendulkar committee moved away from purely calorie-based estimates.

questions.question: Assertion (A): India has never faced a "Balance of Payments" crisis. / अभिकथन (A): भारत ने कभी भी "भुगतान संतुलन" संकट का सामना नहीं किया है। Reason (R): India's exports have always been higher than its imports. / कारण (R): भारत का निर्यात हमेशा उसके आयात से अधिक रहा है। Q33. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is true but R is false
Both A and R are true
A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: India faced a severe BoP crisis in 1991. India usually has a trade deficit.

questions.question: Which of the following are part of the "Capital Account" of BoP? / निम्नलिखित में से कौन BoP के "पूंजी खाते" का हिस्सा हैं? 1. Foreign Loans (ECB). / विदेशी ऋण। 2. Foreign Direct Investment (FDI). / प्रत्यक्ष विदेशी निवेश। 3. Portfolio Investment. / पोर्टफोलियो निवेश। 4. Shipping and Insurance services. / शिपिंग और बीमा सेवाएं। Q34. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Services (Item 4) are part of the Current Account.

questions.question: Assertion (A): "Multidimensional Poverty" is a broader concept than "Income Poverty." / अभिकथन (A): "बहुआयामी गरीबी" "आय गरीबी" की तुलना में एक व्यापक अवधारणा है। Reason (R): It looks at various deprivations like lack of clean water, electricity, and schooling alongside income. / कारण (R): यह आय के साथ-साथ स्वच्छ पानी, बिजली और स्कूली शिक्षा की कमी जैसी विभिन्न वंचितताओं को देखता है। Q35. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
A is false but R is true
A is true but R is false
questions.explanation: MPI (National) used by NITI Aayog uses 12 indicators to measure poverty.

questions.question: Regarding the "Five-Year Plans", consider the following: / "पंचवर्षीय योजनाओं" के संबंध में निम्नलिखित पर विचार करें: Statement 1: The 12th Five-Year Plan was the last one. / कथन 1: 12वीं पंचवर्षीय योजना अंतिम थी। Statement 2: The period of "Plan Holidays" was from 1966 to 1969. / कथन 2: "योजना अवकाश" (Plan Holidays) की अवधि 1966 से 1969 तक थी। Statement 3: NITI Aayog still prepares Five-Year Plans. / कथन 3: नीति आयोग अभी भी पंचवर्षीय योजनाएं तैयार करता है। Q36. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Statement 3 is false; NITI Aayog has replaced Plans with 3-year Action Agendas, 7-year Strategy, and 15-year Vision.

questions.question: Match the BoP Term with its Meaning: / BoP शब्द को उसके अर्थ के साथ सुमेलित करें: List I (Term) | List II (Meaning) 1. Trade Deficit | A. Current Account + Capital Account 2. BoP Equilibrium | B. Export of Goods < Import of Goods 3. Depreciation | C. Fall in currency value due to market forces Q37. Choose the correct match / सही मिलान चुनें
questions.explanation: Depreciation is market-led; Devaluation is government-led.

questions.question: Assertion (A): Remittances from abroad help in reducing India's Current Account Deficit. / अभिकथन (A): विदेशों से प्राप्त रेमिटेंस भारत के चालू खाता घाटे को कम करने में मदद करते हैं। Reason (R): Remittances are a major part of "Invisible" receipts in the Current Account. / कारण (R): रेमिटेंस चालू खाते में "अदृश्य" प्राप्तियों का एक बड़ा हिस्सा हैं। Q38. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is true but R is false
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
questions.explanation: India is often the world's top recipient of remittances.

questions.question: Which of the following would lead to an "Appreciation" of the Indian Rupee? / निम्नलिखित में से किसके कारण भारतीय रुपये के मूल्य में "वृद्धि" (Appreciation) होगी? 1. Huge increase in Indian exports. / भारतीय निर्यात में भारी वृद्धि। 2. Huge inflow of FDI into India. / भारत में FDI का भारी प्रवाह। 3. Increase in oil prices globally. / विश्व स्तर पर तेल की कीमतों में वृद्धि। Q39. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: 1 and 2 increase demand for Rupee; 3 increases demand for Dollars (to pay for oil), leading to Rupee depreciation.

questions.question: Regarding "Absolute Poverty", consider the following: / "निरपेक्ष गरीबी" के संबंध में निम्नलिखित पर विचार करें: Statement 1: It remains constant over time if the poverty line is not revised. / कथन 1: यदि गरीबी रेखा को संशोधित नहीं किया जाता है, तो यह समय के साथ स्थिर रहती है। Statement 2: It is mainly used in developed countries like the USA. / कथन 2: इसका मुख्य रूप से अमेरिका जैसे विकसित देशों में उपयोग किया जाता है। Statement 3: It allows for comparison of poverty levels between different countries using a common line (e.g., $2.15/day). / कथन 3: यह एक सामान्य रेखा (जैसे $2.15/दिन) का उपयोग करके विभिन्न देशों के बीच गरीबी के स्तर की तुलना करने की अनुमति देता है। Q40. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Developed countries mostly use "Relative Poverty." Absolute poverty is common in developing nations.

questions.question: Assertion (A): The Second Five-Year Plan is known for the "Big Push" toward industrialization. / अभिकथन (A): दूसरी पंचवर्षीय योजना औद्योगिकीकरण की ओर "बिग पुश" के लिए जानी जाती है। Reason (R): It emphasized the development of capital goods industries like Steel and Chemicals. / कारण (R): इसने इस्पात और रसायन जैसे पूंजीगत सामान उद्योगों के विकास पर जोर दिया। Q41. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
A is false but R is true
A is true but R is false
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
questions.explanation: This was based on the Mahalanobis model of development.

questions.question: Identify the correct sequence of "Poverty Committees" in India (Oldest to Newest): / भारत में "गरीबी समितियों" के सही क्रम (पुराने से नए) की पहचान करें: 1. Alagh Committee / अलघ समिति 2. Lakdawala Committee / लकड़ावाला समिति 3. Tendulkar Committee / तेंदुलकर समिति 4. Rangarajan Committee / रंगराजन समिति Q42. Choose the correct sequence / सही क्रम चुनें
questions.explanation: Alagh (1979), Lakdawala (1993), Tendulkar (2009), Rangarajan (2014).

questions.question: Match the type of Investment with its character: / निवेश के प्रकार को उसके चरित्र के साथ सुमेलित करें: List I | List II 1. FDI | A. Investment in physical assets/factories 2. FPI | B. Short-term speculative investment in stocks 3. GDR | C. Receipt issued by a foreign bank against shares of an Indian company Q43. Choose the correct match / सही मिलान चुनें
questions.explanation: GDR allows Indian companies to raise money from foreign stock markets.

questions.question: Assertion (A): A "Deficit" in the Balance of Payments is a cause for concern for any economy. / अभिकथन (A): भुगतान संतुलन में "घाटा" किसी भी अर्थव्यवस्था के लिए चिंता का कारण है। Reason (R): It implies the country is using more foreign exchange than it is earning. / कारण (R): इसका तात्पर्य है कि देश अपनी कमाई से अधिक विदेशी मुद्रा का उपयोग कर रहा है। Q44. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
A is true but R is false
A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
questions.explanation: To pay for the deficit, countries must borrow or use their reserves.

questions.question: Which of the following are "Push Factors" for FDI into a country? / किसी देश में FDI के लिए निम्नलिखित में से कौन से "पुश कारक" (Push Factors) हैं? 1. Low interest rates in the home country. / गृह देश में कम ब्याज दरें। 2. Market saturation in the home country. / गृह देश में बाजार की संतृप्ति। 3. Political stability in the host country. / मेजबान देश में राजनीतिक स्थिरता। Q45. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: 1 and 2 are factors in the *investor's* country that "push" them out. 3 is a "pull factor" in the *target* country.

questions.question: Assertion (A): NITI Aayog promotes "Competitive Federalism." / अभिकथन (A): नीति आयोग "प्रतिस्पर्धी संघवाद" को बढ़ावा देता है। Reason (R): It ranks states on various indices like Health, Education, and SDG performance. / कारण (R): यह स्वास्थ्य, शिक्षा और SDG प्रदर्शन जैसे विभिन्न सूचकांकों पर राज्यों को रैंक करता है। Q46. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
A is true but R is false
questions.explanation: Ranking creates a healthy competition among states to improve their performance.

questions.question: Identify the correct pair regarding "Balance of Payments": / "भुगतान संतुलन" के संबंध में सही जोड़ी की पहचान करें: 1. Unilateral Transfers - Current Account / एकतरफा हस्तांतरण - चालू खाता 2. Commercial Borrowings - Capital Account / वाणिज्यिक उधार - पूंजी खाता 3. Export of software - Invisible Trade / सॉफ्टवेयर का निर्यात - अदृश्य व्यापार 4. Import of Machinery - Visible Trade / मशीनरी का आयात - दृश्य व्यापार Q47. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: All pairs are correctly classified according to BoP standards.

questions.question: Assertion (A): The "Planning Commission" was a non-constitutional and non-statutory body. / अभिकथन (A): "योजना आयोग" एक गैर-संवैधानिक और गैर-सांविधिक निकाय था। Reason (R): It was established by an executive resolution of the Government of India. / कारण (R): इसकी स्थापना भारत सरकार के एक कार्यकारी प्रस्ताव द्वारा की गई थी। Q48. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is false but R is true
A is true but R is false
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
questions.explanation: NITI Aayog was also established in the same manner.

questions.question: Which of the following items are included in the "Capital Account"? / पूंजी खाते में निम्नलिखित में से कौन सी वस्तुएं शामिल हैं? 1. Direct investment. / प्रत्यक्ष निवेश। 2. Portfolio investment. / पोर्टफोलियो निवेश। 3. Reserve assets (changes). / आरक्षित संपत्ति (परिवर्तन)। 4. Interest on foreign loans. / विदेशी ऋणों पर ब्याज। Q49. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
questions.explanation: Interest on loans (Item 4) is a service/transfer and goes to the Current Account. The loan itself goes to the Capital Account.

questions.question: Assertion (A): "Relative Poverty" is never zero in any society. / अभिकथन (A): किसी भी समाज में "सापेक्ष गरीबी" कभी शून्य नहीं होती है। Reason (R): There will always be some people who earn less than others in a market economy. / कारण (R): बाजार अर्थव्यवस्था में हमेशा कुछ लोग ऐसे होंगे जो दूसरों की तुलना में कम कमाते हैं। Q50. Choose the correct option / सही विकल्प चुनें
options: A is false but R is true
Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
A is true but R is false
questions.explanation: Even in the richest countries, the bottom 10% are "relatively poor" compared to the top 10%.
